theme: street vendor rearranging a spice rack between customers
title: The Spice Rack Relay
strategies: trivial: keep the jars in their input-given numbering, spend zero swaps all day
greedy: sort jars once by descending raw per-item access frequency (classic static-optimal list order), spend zero swaps

strong: rank by combined pair frequency so correlated jars are adjacent and correctly prioritized, then run a value/cost knapsack over each pair's detected burst window to spend the swap budget pre-positioning whole trains right before they fire
invalid: non-permutation initial line plus a swap-event count that exceeds the budget
